blocks.text: Match preview: Germany Women face Switzerland Women in 5th T20I (T20) on Sun, 12 Jul, 2026, 1:30 pm at SSC, Karlsruhe Karlsruhe. Full pitch report, weather forecast, and squad details below.
Standard T20 surface expected. Conditions will be clearer at the toss — monitor team selection and dew factor for night games.
Expected par score: 160–180 runs par score.
Partly cloudy · High 33°C / Low 18°C · Rain: 0 mm · Wind: up to 19 km/h. Dry conditions expected — good for batting if the pitch is true.
International playing XI is announced at the toss. Check back on match day for confirmed line-ups.
